name: MARKETWISE, INC.
business: We are a leading multi-brand platform of subscription businesses that provides premium financial research, software, education, and tools for self-directed investors.

exposures.sentence: Our entire investment research product portfolio is 100% digital and channel agnostic, and we offer all of our research across a variety of platforms, including desktop, laptop, and mobile devices, including tablets and mobile phones.

We have invested significant resources into our efforts around consumer marketing, including enterprise-wide customer relationship management ( CRM ) systems, the leveraging of artificial intelligence ( AI ) to analyze this data, and a robust database of customer information.
